name: Sour Cream Belgian Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the butter, milk, vanilla extract, sugar, beaten eggs, and sour cream.
For lighter waffles, beat egg whites until stiff and fold them in separately from the yolks.
2. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
3. Heat your waffle iron and cook until golden brown, about 3/4 to 1 cup per waffle.
